title: Prohibited acquisitions
doc_html:
§2115.22.  Prohibited acquisitions

Any proprietary hospital management company shall be prohibited from purchasing a not-for-profit hospital that such management company has managed at any time in the previous three years prior to the date of sale.

Acts 1999, No. 1279, §§1, 2.
